EVI ID  : 1
ETH TAG : 0

commands.command: show evpn forwarding-table mac-address-table instance HA_TEST_ELAN | no-more
commands.output_preview:
Legend: * - Active, A - Alternate path, B - Bypass, S - Secondary, EA - Enhanced-Alternate
Flags: R - Remote, L - Local, D - Dynamic, P - Pending-Installation, si - Sticky-Interface,
       S - Sticky (local), sp - Suppressed, F - Leaf, ri - Router-Interface, fl - Flood, bh - Black-Hole
Egress-Encapsulation: M - MPLS {labels are arranged from top (left) to BoS (right), E - Entropy Label}
                      V - VXLAN {vtep id}

NCP-ID 18

EVPN: HA_TEST_ELAN
Total MAC Entries: 1

| MacAddress
